A data-driven celebration of the incredible ecology of the Sonoran Desert.

Explore with us

The Sonoran Desert is full of hidden beauty and rich ecological stories.

We work to bring those stories to life.

  • Explore Gallery

Sonoran Species Compendium

A meticulous cataloging effort of species and their interactions at three focal sites in the Sonoran Desert of Arizona—combining field observations with curated taxonomic resources.

  • Explore Project

Photography

Photography as a means to capture biodiversity in space and time.

  • View Gallery

Rewilding the Yard

An intimate experiment in transforming an urban yard into a haven for native plants and animals.

  • Learn More

Biological Interactions

Documenting ecological relationships between organisms using various approaches and data-driven tools.

  • Explore Data

WhiskerWiki

Created to aid field biologists, specimen preparators, students, and mammal enthusiasts in the identification of shrews, moles, and small rodents in the United States of America

  • Explore small mammals

Artwork

Sketches of desert wildlife—by Laura Steger
